sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76940" key="palinodi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πᾰλῐν-οδία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ὁδός</etym>) <sense id="n76940.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">retracing one's path</tr_>: hence, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">recurrence</tr_> of numbers, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">57</biblScope> </bibl>(pl.); <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κατὰ παλινοδίαν</foreign> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">59</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
